sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58267" key="kogxi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κογχ-ίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ] λίθος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n58267.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shelly marble</tr_>, found near Megara, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:44:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.44.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
